**Consolidated solver results (Phases 0-2).** Cost J is the Bolza
min-energy objective integral |u|^2 dt. Rows follow NARRATIVE.md order.

| Phase / Case            | Method                          | NLP vars | Iterations  | Wall time [s] | Cost J    |
| ----------------------- | ------------------------------- | -------- | ----------- | ------------- | --------- |
| Earth->Mars (2-body)    | Indirect shooting               | 4        | 24 (nfev)   | 0.85          | 0.0149    |
| Earth->Mars (2-body)    | Global Bezier + IPOPT           | 896      | 2           | 1.2           | 0.0149    |
| Planar CR3BP (L1<->L2)  | Indirect shooting               | 4        | 95 (nfev)   | 6.0           | 0.0431    |
| Planar CR3BP (L1<->L2)  | Global Bezier + IPOPT           | 896      | 5           | 2.0           | 0.0432    |
| Planar CR3BP (L1<->L2)  | Segmented Bezier + SLSQP (N=16) | 700      | 294         | 529           | 0.0432    |
| Artemis II Post-TLI     | Indirect shooting (best of 15)  | 6        | 1236 (nfev) | 2.0e+03       | 6.209e-07 |
| Artemis II Post-TLI     | IPOPT multi-shooting            | 906      | 2           | 0.81          | 5.298e-12 |
| Artemis II Full Mission | IPOPT multi-shooting            | 2031     | 4           | 1.7           | 9.440e-04 |

Note: cells marked `(nfev)` fall back to function-evaluation count
because the solver (SciPy fsolve) does not expose a distinct iteration counter.
